title: Substrate transfer mechanism to reduce back-side substrate contact
abstract: A substrate processing system is disclosed which includes a substrate input/output chamber coupled to a transfer chamber, and one or more processing chambers coupled to the transfer chamber, wherein the substrate input/output chamber includes a plurality of stacked carrier holders, and one of the carrier holders includes a substrate carrier to support a substrate thereon.
claims: Claims Claims: 1. A substrate processing system, comprising: a transfer chamber; a substrate input/output chamber coupled to the transfer chamber; and a processing chamber coupled to the transfer chamber; wherein the substrate input/output chamber includes a plurality of stacked carrier holders, and one of the plurality of stacked carrier holders includes a substrate carrier to support a substrate thereon. 2. The processing system of claim 1 , wherein each of the stacked carrier holders includes a plurality of support members extending therefrom to support the carrier. 3. The processing system of claim 1 , wherein the substrate input/output chamber includes a platen having a plurality of lift pins movably disposed therethrough. 4. The processing system of claim 3, wherein each of the lift pins comprise a tip and a shaft, and the tip is made of a material that is softer than the material of the shaft. 5. The processing system of claim 3, wherein each of the lift pins is operably coupled to a dedicated actuator. 6. The processing system of claim 3, wherein each of the lift pins are disposed in openings formed in the platen, and each of the openings are fluidly coupled to a vacuum system. 7. The processing system of claim 3, wherein each of the lift pins is coupled to a substrate lift mechanism comprising a base and a motor. 8. The processing system of claim 1 , wherein the platen includes a heat transfer element embedded therein. 9. The processing system of claim 1 , wherein the platen includes a plurality of alignment pads for centering the carrier. 10. The processing system of claim 1 , wherein each of the processing chamber includes a susceptor having a groove formed therein for receiving the carrier. 11. The processing system of claim 10, wherein the susceptor is supported by a substrate support structure. 12. The processing system of claim 11 , wherein the susceptor support structure includes a plurality of carrier lift pins. 13. The processing system of claim 12, wherein each of the carrier lift pins is received in an opening adjacent to the groove. 14. A load lock chamber, comprising: a platen having a heat transfer element embedded therein; a plurality of carrier holders positioned about the platen; a plurality of support members extending from each of the stacked carrier holders; and a carrier positioned on the support members of one of the plurality of stacked carrier holders. 15. The load lock chamber of claim 14, wherein each of the carrier holders includes a plurality of support members extending therefrom to support the carrier.
